queries.question: Show all of the growth equity firms and the venture capital trusts where either have 5M funding.
queries.sql:
SELECT InvestmentCompanies.Name 
FROM InvestmentCompanies
WHERE (InvestmentCompanies.Type = "Growth Equity Firm" OR InvestmentCompanies.Type = "Venture Capital Trust") AND InvestmentCompanies.FundingAmount = 5000000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?investmentcompanies a :InvestmentCompanies .
  ?investmentcompanies p:name ?name .
  ?investmentcompanies p:Type ?type_w .
  ?investmentcompanies p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?investmentcompanies p:FundingAmount ?fundingamount_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Growth Equity Firm" || STR(?type_w2) = "Venture Capital Trust")) && (STR(?fundingamount_w) = "5000000" || STR(?fundingamount_w) = "5000000.0")))
}
